violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. PIC states they are registered for class and test. FMC must re-instate once food safety certificate is obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2025

The hand-washing sink in the warewashing area was blocked by a cutting board. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Raw chicken was observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as tomato sauce in reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
Infant seating, items and car seat were observed in the kitchen. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the table next to 3 bay sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Treatment plan has been made between establishment and pest control. Report attached. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The dishwasher was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be in good repair. Per PIC, parts are on order for dishwashing machine at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink behind the front counter. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the 1 door reach-in cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The walk-in cooler was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was evaluated within unit and TCS foods above 45 degrees Fahrenheit were voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is not to store TCS foods in unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less is obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Household insecticide was observed below front counter. PIC was instructed to remove insecticide from establishment. Insecticides and rodenticides are to be exclusively applied by commercial pest technician. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, boiled potatoes were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. PIC was supplied with RIDOH cooling methods literature. Potatoes were voluntarily disposed of at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The dishwasher and walk-in cooler were not in good repair. Equipment must be in good repair. Per PIC, parts are on order for dishwashing machine and service was called for walk-in cooler at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

The dishwasher area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back door area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
A splashguard is needed at the prep-sink in the preparation area, between the prep-sink and the prep table. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
The door to the employee/costumer's toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
